comments.text: Personally, for thick hair, I would use an oil-based pomade. If your hair is super thick, gel would work great too. Gel doesn't work for a lot of people becuase it crunches your hair down, but if you have thick hair it should work. I'm a barber in the military and both pomade and gel work a miracle, but again, my hair is very thick and full. If you're looking for a poofy hairstyle I wouldn't recommend pomade or gel, though. I would recommend clay. But to answer your question, yes, pomade works wonderfully on thick hair, but keep in mind, it can't be sitting up super high, whereas with clay, it can. For a casual look with pomade I would go for a lighter hold, but for a more sleek, crisp look I would go with a medium to even a strong hold. But that's all up to you. Hope this helped. Cheers.
